Class PlayGame

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.game.Game
whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
public class PlayGame extends Game

    Description

    A no-arg constructor for the PlayGame class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
    A simple getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
    void

    A method for updating the scores based on the current round.
    boolean
    evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
    A method for evaluating the current trick of the current round.
    boolean
    evaluateRoundBids()
    Evaluates the submitted bids of the current round to determine the final bid and the declarers.
    String
    getActivePlayerName()
    A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing) in the current round.
    String[]
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
    Returns the cards the current player is legally allowed to play.
    LinkedHashMap<String,String>
    getCardsFromPreviousTrick()
    A simple getter for finding the cards of the previously played trick in the current round.
    protected PlayRound
    getCurrentRound()
    A simple getter for finding the current round in this game.
    HashMap<String,String>
    getCurrentRoundCurrentTrickCards()
    A getter for the trick cards of the current trick in the current round.
    Suit
    getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit()
    A getter for the trump suit of the current round.
    LinkedHashMap<String,String>
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
    Returns the cards played in the current trick.
    String
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
    Returns the name of the winner of the current trick.
    String
    getDealerName()
    Returns the name of the dealer for the current round.
    String
    getExistingBids()
    Returns a string showing every active bid in this round.
    String[]
    getFinalBidDeclarers()
    Returns the names of the declarers of the final winning bid.
    String
    getFinalBidName()
    Returns the active chosen bids name.
    BidType
    getHighestBid()
    Returns the highest bid established in this round so far.
    String
    getLastDealtCard()
    A getter for the last dealt card in the current round.
    String
    getLastTrickString()
    Returns a string representation of the last completed trick.
    String
    getLoneProposerName()
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    HashMap<String,String[]>
    getOpenMiserieHands(String currentPlayer)
    A getter for the cards of the other players currently bidding open miserie.
    String
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display.
    String[]
    getPlayerCards(String playerName)
    A getter for the cards of the specified player.
    String[]
    getPossibleBidNames()
    Returns the possible bids that can still be played.
    HashMap<String,Integer>
    getRoundScoresPerPlayer()
    A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.
    int
    getTricksLeft()
    Returns the number of tricks left in this round.
    String
    getTrumpSuitName()
    Returns a display name for the trump suit of the current round.
    boolean

    Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    boolean

    Returns true if the current trick is completely played.

    A method starting an autonomous bid in the current round.
    void

    A method for processing an autonomous card play.
    void

    A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player of the current round.

    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.

    A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed.

    A method for starting a new round.
    void

    A method for starting the playing process of the round.

    A method for submitting a bid for the current player in the current round.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayGame

      public PlayGame()
      A no-arg constructor for the PlayGame class.

    • PlayGame

      public PlayGame(LinkedHashMap<String, BotDifficulty> players)
      A constructor for creating a new game of PlayWhist.
      Parameters:
      players - A map of players and their respective bot difficulty (null if human).

  • Method Details

    • startNewRound

      public void startNewRound()
      Description copied from class: Game
      A method for starting a new round. This is an abstract method, because the implementation depends on the type of game.
      Specified by:
      startNewRound in class Game

    • proceedAutonomousBid

      public void proceedAutonomousBid()
      A method starting an autonomous bid in the current round. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      proceedAutonomousBid in class Game

    • submitBid

      public void submitBid(String bidType, Suit newTrumpSuit)
      A method for submitting a bid for the current player in the current round. Also advances to the next player. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      submitBid in class Game
      Parameters:
      bidType - The bid to submit.
      newTrumpSuit - The optional new trump suit.

    • evaluateRoundBids

      public boolean evaluateRoundBids()
      Evaluates the submitted bids of the current round to determine the final bid and the declarers.
      Overrides:
      evaluateRoundBids in class Game
      Returns:
      True, if a final bid was chosen and the playing can start. False, if everyone passed.

    • restartFailedRound

      public void restartFailedRound()
      A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      restartFailedRound in class Game

    • startPlayingRound

      public void startPlayingRound()
      A method for starting the playing process of the round. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      startPlayingRound in class Game

    • processCardPlay

      public void processCardPlay(String card)
      A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player of the current round.
      Overrides:
      processCardPlay in class Game
      Parameters:
      card - The card played.

    • processAutonomousCardPlay

      public void processAutonomousCardPlay()
      A method for processing an autonomous card play. This fails if the current player requires input.
      Overrides:
      processAutonomousCardPlay in class Game

    • evaluateAndAdvanceTrick

      public boolean evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
      A method for evaluating the current trick of the current round. Dispatches to the PlayRound class. This also advances the round to the next trick.
      Overrides:
      evaluateAndAdvanceTrick in class Game
      Returns:
      True, if the final trick was reached. False, otherwise.

    • calculateAndUpdateScores

      public void calculateAndUpdateScores()
      A method for updating the scores based on the current round.
      Overrides:
      calculateAndUpdateScores in class Game

    • bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration

      public boolean bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
      Description copied from class: Game
      A simple getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration in class Game
      Parameters:
      chosenBid - The name of the bid
      Returns:
      true if the bid requires a trump to be declared at bid time, false otherwise.

    • getLastTrickString

      public String getLastTrickString()
      Returns a string representation of the last completed trick. Dispatches to getCardsFromPreviousTrick().
      Overrides:
      getLastTrickString in class Game
      Returns:
      A string representation of the last trick.

    • isAutonomous

      public boolean isAutonomous(int playerIndex)
      Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
      Overrides:
      isAutonomous in class Game
      Parameters:
      playerIndex - The index of the player to check
      Returns:
      True if autonomous, false otherwise

    • isTrickOver

      public boolean isTrickOver()
      Returns true if the current trick is completely played.
      Overrides:
      isTrickOver in class Game

    • getExistingBids

      public String getExistingBids()
      Returns a string showing every active bid in this round. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      getExistingBids in class Game
      Returns:
      the string

    • getFinalBidName

      public String getFinalBidName()
      Returns the active chosen bids name. Dispatches to the PlayRound class.
      Overrides:
      getFinalBidName in class Game
      Returns:
      The name of the final round bid.

    • getFinalBidDeclarers

      public String[] getFinalBidDeclarers()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns the names of the declarers of the final winning bid.
      Overrides:
      getFinalBidDeclarers in class Game

      getPossibleBidNames in class Game

      Returns the name of the dealer for the current round.

    • getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings

      public LinkedHashMap<String,String> getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns the cards played in the current trick. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings in class Game

    • getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer

      public String[] getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns the cards the current player is legally allowed to play. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer in class Game

    • getTrumpSuitName

      public String getTrumpSuitName()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns a display name for the trump suit of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      getTrumpSuitName in class Game

    • getOriginalTrumpSuitName

      public String getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      getOriginalTrumpSuitName in class Game

    • getCurrentTrickWinnerName

      public String getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
      Description copied from class: Game
      Returns the name of the winner of the current trick. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Overrides:
      getCurrentTrickWinnerName in class Game

      A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.

      protected PlayRound getCurrentRound()
      A simple getter for finding the current round in this game.

      public String getActivePlayerName()
      A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing) in the current round.
      Overrides:
      getActivePlayerName in class Game

      The name of the active player.

      A getter for the cards of the specified player.

    • getCurrentRoundCurrentTrickCards

      A getter for the trick cards of the current trick in the current round.

      A map playerName -> cardString

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<String,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands(String currentPlayer)
      A getter for the cards of the other players currently bidding open miserie.
      Overrides:
      getOpenMiserieHands in class Game
      Parameters:
      currentPlayer - The current player.
      Returns:
      A map playerName -> cardStrings never containing currentPlayer as playerName

    • getCardsFromPreviousTrick

      public LinkedHashMap<String,String> getCardsFromPreviousTrick()
      A simple getter for finding the cards of the previously played trick in the current round.

      This method dispatches to the PlayRound class.

      Returns:
      A map playerName -> cardString

      Returns the number of tricks left in this round.
